creator: alt2600@icloud.com
text:
(In reply to Adriaan de Groot from comment #1)

from 13.0p10 amd64
/usr/ports/devel/glib20|$ sudo make showconfig
===> The following configuration options are available for glib-2.70.4_4,2:
     DEBUG=off: Build with debugging support
     DOCS=on: Build and/or install documentation
     FAM_ALTBACKEND=off: Alternate file monitor backend
     MANPAGES=on: Build and/or install manual pages
     NLS=on: Native Language Support
     TEST=on: Build and/or run tests
===> Use 'make config' to modify these settings


even https://www.freshports.org/devel/glib20
shows DOCS are on in the default config when you view the port options available.  and my i386 jail has absolutely no options set in it whatsoever except to use base ssl.

but I don't know. I guess I'll wait for latest to update on the main pkg repo and see what it says there.
